title: Rings+
description: Rename items to get rings (OptiFine required) + DataPack, which give effects to some rings!
body:
## Rings+

![rings+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14c1597c8bdbbe7c8ae40edf873c684637206b3c.png)

## What is Rings+?

This is a ResourcePack (that required OptiFine or CIT) combinated with DataPack, that adds rings to your game.

## How to rename to get Rings?

### Rings have the cathegories. To get iron rings it you need rename iron ingot according to this scheme:

Iron + None/Amethyst/Diamond/Emerald/Lapis/Redstone + Ring
 
_!IMPORTANT! All words **must** be written starting with capital letter!_

### Next group of rings is golden. Rename golden ingot like this:

Golden + None/Amethyst/Diamond/Emerald/Lapis/Redstone + Ring

### To get netherite rings rename netherite ingot to:

Netherite + None/Amethyst/Diamond/Emerald/Lapis/Redstone + Ring

### To get copper rings rename copper ingot to:

Copper + None/Amethyst/Diamond/Emerald/Lapis/Redstone + Ring

Copper Oxidized Ring and Copper Half Oxidized Ring available too!

### There are also this rings, which can give you effects if you install Datapack too:

Amethyst Shard      ---> Amethyst Ring (gives night vision)

Bone                ---> Bone Ring (gives weakness to all mobs nearby you)

Diamond             ---> Diamond Ring (gives speed up effect)

Emerald             ---> Emerald Ring (gives hero of the village effect)

Honeycomb           ---> Honey Ring (gives slowness to all mobs nearby you)

Lapis Lazuli        ---> Lapis Ring (gives you water breathing)

Nether Star         ---> Nether Ring (gives resistance effect)

Ominous Trial Key   ---> Ominous Trial Ring (gives health boost)

Redstone            ---> Redstone Ring (gives haste)

Slime Ball          ---> Slime Ring (gives jump boost)

Trial Key           ---> Trial Ring (gives glowing effect to all mobs nearby you)
